patterns.message: packages/core is runtime-neutral and must not import Node.js APIs (issue #100). Accept values as explicit parameters instead.
packages/core is runtime-neutral and must not import Bun APIs (issue #100).
packages/core must not depend on React / Web UI modules (issue #100). UI code belongs in apps/web.
packages/core must not depend on apps/web or packages/cli (issue #100). The dependency direction is web/cli -> core only.

no-restricted-globals.name: process
no-restricted-globals.message: packages/core is runtime-neutral and must not read process state (issue #100). Accept values as explicit parameters instead.

no-restricted-globals.name: Bun
no-restricted-globals.message: packages/core is runtime-neutral and must not use the Bun global (issue #100).

no-restricted-globals.name: window
no-restricted-globals.message: packages/core is runtime-neutral and must not use browser globals (issue #100).

no-restricted-globals.name: document
no-restricted-globals.message: packages/core is runtime-neutral and must not use browser globals (issue #100).

no-restricted-globals.name: navigator
no-restricted-globals.message: packages/core is runtime-neutral and must not use browser globals (issue #100).

no-restricted-globals.name: localStorage
no-restricted-globals.message: packages/core is runtime-neutral and must not use browser storage (issue #100).

no-restricted-globals.name: sessionStorage
no-restricted-globals.message: packages/core is runtime-neutral and must not use browser storage (issue #100).

patterns.message: packages/core is runtime-neutral and must not import runtime-specific APIs or other packages (issue #100).

generator core (src/generatedInstaller/) must not import package.json directly. Accept build/package-derived values (e.g. the installerer version) as an explicit parameter instead, see docs/adr/20260703T144753Z_generator-version-injection-boundary.md.

generator core (src/generatedInstaller/) must not import CLI code (e.g. cliVersion). Accept the value as an explicit parameter instead, see docs/adr/20260703T144753Z_generator-version-injection-boundary.md.
